Container.Name: Eyeris
Container.Overview: Self-hosted AI photo manager. Eyeris scans your NAS or local photo library, generates thumbnails, runs AI analysis to describe and tag images, clusters faces into people, and gives you a fast searchable gallery — all on your own hardware. No cloud, no subscriptions. Features include: AI-powered photo search, face recognition and clustering, NSFW detection, EXIF and GPS metadata, album organisation, SearXNG web image search integration, and a real-time dashboard. Powered by a local llama.cpp vision model (Gemma 4 recommended).
Container.Requires: Requires a running llama.cpp server with a vision model loaded (e.g. Gemma 4). Optional: MariaDB for large libraries (SQLite used by default).

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Eyeris web interface and API.

Config.Name: Photo Directory
Config.Description: Your photo library — local folder or SMB/NFS mount point.

Config.Name: Thumbnails
Config.Description: Where Eyeris stores generated thumbnails and AI model cache.

Config.Name: Database
Config.Description: SQLite database storage. Ignored if DB_HOST is set.

Config.Name: Config file (.env)
Config.Description: Persistent config file — Eyeris reads and writes settings here. Create an empty file at this path before first run.

Config.Name: Intel / AMD GPU device
Config.Description: Pass through Intel iGPU/Arc or AMD GPU for hardware-accelerated thumbnail generation. Remove this line if using NVIDIA only.

Config.Name: NAS Host
Config.Description: IP or hostname of your NAS. Leave empty if photos are already accessible via the Photo Directory path above.

Config.Name: NAS Shares
Config.Description: Comma-separated share names to scan, e.g. photos,media,camera-uploads

Config.Name: LLM Server URL
Config.Description: URL of your running llama.cpp server, e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8080. Required for AI image descriptions and tagging.

Config.Name: SearXNG URL
Config.Description: URL of a SearXNG instance for web image search integration (optional).

Config.Name: Scan Workers
Config.Description: Number of parallel AI analysis workers. Raise to 3-4 on fast CPUs; lower if your system struggles.

Config.Name: Scan Interval (minutes)
Config.Description: How often Eyeris rescans for new photos.

Config.Name: MariaDB Host
Config.Description: MariaDB host IP or hostname. Leave empty to use the built-in SQLite database (recommended for most users).
